seoTitle: How to Use Zapier with WhatsApp (2026 Guide)
metaDescription: Send automated WhatsApp messages from Zapier using session and template messages, mapped phone numbers, and live testing.
intro: Reaching customers on WhatsApp usually gets more opens than email, but sending messages manually doesn't scale. This guide shows how to connect a trigger app to WhatsApp inside Zapier, choose between session and template messages, and map dynamic customer data so alerts reach the right phone number automatically.

steps.heading: Create a new Zap and define your trigger
steps.body: Set up your primary incoming data trigger step in Zapier.

steps.heading: Choose your WhatsApp integration app
steps.body: Select a WhatsApp action app from the Zapier directory, such as WhatsApp Business Cloud API or a gateway service.

steps.heading: Authenticate your account
steps.body: Securely connect your account and manage the required API access tokens.

steps.heading: Choose your message type
steps.body: Decide between sending a pre-approved Session Message or a Template Message depending on the recipient's opt-in status.

steps.heading: Map phone numbers and message data
steps.body: Map dynamic customer phone numbers and other data tokens safely into your message variables.

steps.heading: Run a live test
steps.body: Test the full flow end-to-end and verify delivery on a mobile device before publishing your Zap.

faq.question: What's the difference between session and template messages?
faq.answer: Session messages are for ongoing conversations, while template messages are pre-approved formats required for reaching customers outside an active conversation window.

faq.question: Can I send WhatsApp messages to international customers?
faq.answer: Yes, the setup includes handling global country codes when mapping phone numbers.

faq.question: Do I need a WhatsApp Business account?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll typically connect through WhatsApp Business Cloud API or a supported gateway, which requires a business account.

faq.question: How do I confirm the message actually sends?
faq.answer: Run a live end-to-end test and check delivery directly on a mobile device before publishing the Zap.
